title: HTTP Client Ownership, Context, Status, Body Limits, and Cleanup · Runtime Contract: Pokedex Go Roundtripper Tests
summary: Each command creates a new client, uses context.Background inside dependencies, ignores non-2xx status, decodes unbounded bodies, and forgets to close responses. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go roundtripper tests increment in reusable bounded context-aware PokéAPI client. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory…
objectives: Use injected RoundTripper and httptest server cases for headers, URL, context, status, body limit, cancellation, and cleanup.
Close every non-nil response body, bound bytes, distinguish read and decode failure, and preserve connection-reuse implications.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
